absorption: Bids are being aggressively eaten at 30620.25 (50 sells) and 30620.00 (85 sells), indicating a lack of bullish absorption and strong bearish pressure.
dom_observation: Heavy market selling is hitting bids at 30620.25 and 30620.00, pushing the price below vPOC. Bids below are not immediately strong enough to absorb this selling pressure.
reason: Aggressive market selling is clearing bids at and below vPOC (30620.00), confirmed by negative delta and overall bearish CVD, indicating a breakdown. Buying power is exhausted.
should_reason: Order flow (heavy selling at bid) aligns with bearish bias and vPOC breakdown, offering a clear entry and stop with high confidence.
